.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(144, 150, 164) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgba(37, 37, 37, 0.765) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#9096A4, color-mix(in srgb, #9096A4 65%, transparent))

code.background: rgb(165, 170, 182) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
